after_cost_paper_trading_summary.policy: computed from passed pre-registered paper-trading runs only; blocked or profile-only recipes are excluded

next_actions: regenerate method patterns with source_footprint_ids preserved
keep forecast claims and analytical footprints available for derived refresh
rebuild PIT outcome labels so labels carry recipe_id or method_pattern_id
rerun recipe paper-trading after direct labels and shadow tools are ready
link recipes to source-grounded method patterns and PIT outcome labels
expand direct PIT-bound outcome samples until effective_n passes
implement or reject requested shadow tools before validation
direct_pit_binding_diagnostics.policy: profile weights and method names are insufficient; recipe paper-trading requires direct PIT outcome labels bound to the recipe or its source method pattern

policy: paper-trading validation is a shadow gate; profile support can prioritize recipes but cannot promote confidence impact without direct PIT paper-trading evidence
pre_registration_policy: each recipe has a deterministic experiment id and pre-registration hash before any outcome metrics are evaluated

tool_implementation_queue.queue_policy: implement or explicitly reject tool gaps linked to direct-PIT validation candidates before promoting recipe confidence impact
